summary: Iteration 14 Testing Complete - BIQC Onboarding State Handling Verified. All 13 backend tests passed. Key changes verified: 1) Backend GET /api/onboarding/status has NO auto-complete logic based on company_name, 2) ProtectedRoute.js reads onboardingStatus from context ONLY (no API calls), 3) SupabaseAuthContext fetches onboarding status ONCE during bootstrap, 4) OnboardingWizard calls markOnboardingComplete() from context.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: server.py lines 5844-5865 - GET /api/onboarding/status has NO auto-complete logic based on company_name
VERIFIED: server.py line 5853-5858 - Returns completed=false when no onboarding record exists
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js has NO useEffect that calls GET /api/onboarding/status
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js line 67 - Destructures onboardingStatus from useSupabaseAuth()
VERIFIED: ProtectedRoute.js lines 117-123 - Uses cached onboardingStatus for redirect decision
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js line 34 - Has onboardingStatus state (null = not fetched, object = fetched)
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js lines 187-190 - Has markOnboardingComplete callback
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js lines 247-266 - Fetches onboarding status ONCE during bootstrap (after calibration check)
VERIFIED: SupabaseAuthContext.js lines 303-304 - Exposes onboardingStatus and markOnboardingComplete in context value
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard.js line 33 - Destructures markOnboardingComplete from useSupabaseAuth()
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard.js line 164 - Calls markOnboardingComplete() on completion
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard.js line 50 - Loads existing data from GET /api/business-profile/context
VERIFIED: OnboardingWizard.js lines 91-93 - Resumes from last step using onboarding.current_step
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding state handling fully verified. Key architecture: SupabaseAuthContext is single source of truth for onboardingStatus. Bootstrap flow: auth → calibration check → onboarding status fetch ONCE → state cached. ProtectedRoute reads cached state only, no API calls. OnboardingWizard loads from /api/business-profile/context and calls markOnboardingComplete() to update cache on completion.

features_verified.backend_no_auto_complete: COMPLETE - GET /api/onboarding/status has NO company_name check
features_verified.backend_returns_false_when_no_record: COMPLETE - Returns completed=false with current_step=0 when no onboarding record
features_verified.context_fetches_once: COMPLETE - SupabaseAuthContext fetches onboarding ONCE after calibration
features_verified.context_exposes_state: COMPLETE - onboardingStatus and markOnboardingComplete exposed in context
features_verified.protectedroute_redirect: COMPLETE - Redirects to /onboarding when completed=false and path not exempt

code_structure_notes.single_fetch_flow: SupabaseAuthContext bootstrap: auth hydrate → calibration check → IF complete → fetch /api/onboarding/status ONCE → cache in state
code_structure_notes.protectedroute_flow: Read onboardingStatus from context → IF null: show loading → IF not completed: redirect → ELSE: render children
